name: IndusInd Tiger Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: Extra reward points on weekend spending (Saturday & Sunday)
2 Reward Points per ₹100 spent on all purchases

additionalBenefits: Fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹200 per month
2 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
Easy EMI conversion on large purchases
pros: Low annual fee of ₹599 with easy waiver at ₹1.5L spend
Good base earn rate of 2 RP/₹100 for a mid-tier card
Extra rewards on weekends for lifestyle spending
cons: Low point value of ₹0.25 per point reduces effective reward rate
Only 2 domestic lounge visits per year
idealFor: Weekend shoppers who want extra rewards on Saturday and Sunday spends
Budget-conscious users seeking an affordable mid-tier card
Users looking for a basic Mastercard with lounge access

faqs.question: How does the weekend reward bonus work?
faqs.answer: All purchases made on Saturday and Sunday earn additional bonus reward points on top of the base 2 RP/₹100 rate. This makes weekend shopping and entertainment more rewarding.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹599 annual fee is waived if you spend ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous anniversary year.

faqs.question: What lounge access does the Tiger card offer?
faqs.answer: The Tiger card offers 2 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year via the Mastercard Lounge Program. International lounge access is not included.
